input.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="it">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>WisdomEP – Smart Parking & IoT Solutions</title>
  <style>
    /* =====================================================
       RESET & BASE
    ===================================================== */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
      --blue-dark:  #0a1628;
      --blue-mid:   #0d2d5e;
      --blue-main:  #1557b0;
      --blue-light: #2a85e8;
      --cyan:       #00c8e0;
      --cyan-soft:  #a0eaf4;
      --white:      #ffffff;
      --gray-bg:    #f4f7fb;
      --gray-mid:   #e0e8f0;
      --gray-text:  #4a5568;
      --font-main:  'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body  { font-family: var(--font-main); color: var(--blue-dark); background: var(--white); }
    h1, h2, h3, h4 { line-height: 1.2; }
    a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }
    img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }

    /* =====================================================
       UTILITY
    ===================================================== */
    .container   { max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
    .section-tag { display: inline-block; background: var(--cyan); color: var(--blue-dark);
                   font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
                   text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .section-title { font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 800; color: var(--blue-dark); margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .section-sub   { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--gray-text); max-width: 640px; line-height: 1.7; }
    .btn-primary {
      display: inline-block; background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--white);
      padding: 13px 32px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.97rem;
      border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, transform .2s;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--blue-main); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .btn-outline {
      display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: var(--blue-light);
      padding: 12px 30px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.97rem;
      border: 2px solid var(--blue-light); cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s;
    }
    .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--white); }
    .divider { width: 60px; height: 4px; background: var(--cyan); border-radius: 4px; margin: 0 0 28px; }

    /* =====================================================
       TOPBAR
    ===================================================== */
    .topbar {
      background: var(--blue-dark); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
      font-size: 0.82rem; padding: 6px 0;
    }
    .topbar .container { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
    .topbar a { color: var(--cyan); margin-left: 18px; }
    .topbar .lang { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
    .topbar .lang a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
    .topbar .lang a.active { color: var(--cyan); font-weight: 700; }

    /* =====================================================
       NAVBAR
    ===================================================== */
    .navbar {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 999;
      background: rgba(10,22,40,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    }
    .navbar .container {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      height: 70px;
    }
    .navbar-logo {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    }
    .navbar-logo .logo-icon {
      width: 42px; height: 42px; background: var(--cyan);
      border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center;
      justify-content: center; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--blue-dark);
    }
    .navbar-logo .logo-name { color: var(--white); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .navbar-logo .logo-name span { color: var(--cyan); }

    .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500;
                   padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: all .2s; }
    .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--cyan); border-bottom-color: var(--cyan); }

    .nav-cta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; padding: 6px; }
    .hamburger span { display: block; width: 26px; height: 2px; background: var(--white); border-radius: 2px; transition: .3s; }

    /* =====================================================
       HERO
    ===================================================== */
    .hero {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-dark) 0%, var(--blue-mid) 60%, #0a3a6e 100%);
      min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 120px 0 80px;
    }
    /* decorative grid */
    .hero::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(0,200,224,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,200,224,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 60px 60px;
    }
    /* decorative glow */
    .hero::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; top: -80px; right: -120px;
      width: 600px; height: 600px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,200,224,0.14) 0%, transparent 70%);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .hero .container { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; }
    .hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
                  background: rgba(0,200,224,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(0,200,224,0.3);
                  color: var(--cyan); font-size: 0.83rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
                  padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 30px; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .hero-badge .dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--cyan); border-radius: 50%;
                       animation: blink 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1;} 50%{opacity:0.3;} }
    .hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 3.6rem); color: var(--white); font-weight: 900;
               line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .hero h1 span { color: var(--cyan); }
    .hero p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 36px; max-width: 520px; }
    .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .hero-stats { display: flex; gap: 32px; margin-top: 52px; }
    .hero-stat { text-align: center; }
    .hero-stat .num { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--cyan); }
    .hero-stat .lbl { font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-top: 4px; }

    /* Hero visual – smart city mockup */
    .hero-visual {
      position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .city-card {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(0,200,224,0.25);
      border-radius: 20px; padding: 36px; width: 100%; max-width: 420px;
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }
    .city-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .city-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; background: var(--cyan); border-radius: 12px;
                      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.5rem; }
    .city-card-title { color: var(--white); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; }
    .city-card-sub   { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.82rem; }
    .park-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .park-slot {
      aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700;
    }
    .park-slot.free    { background: rgba(0,200,224,0.18); border: 1px solid rgba(0,200,224,0.4); color: var(--cyan); }
    .park-slot.busy    { background: rgba(255,80,80,0.18);  border: 1px solid rgba(255,80,80,0.4);  color: #ff8080; }
    .park-slot.reserved{ background: rgba(255,200,0,0.18);  border: 1px solid rgba(255,200,0,0.4);  color: #ffd700; }
    .park-legend { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .park-legend span { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .park-legend span::before { content: ''; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .park-legend .l-free::before  { background: var(--cyan); }
    .park-legend .l-busy::before  { background: #ff8080; }
    .park-legend .l-res::before   { background: #ffd700; }
    .metrics-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px; }
    .metric-pill { flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 10px;
                   padding: 12px 10px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
    .metric-pill .mv { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--cyan); }
    .metric-pill .ml { font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin-top: 2px; }

    /* =====================================================
       CHI SIAMO
    ===================================================== */
    #chi-siamo { padding: 100px 0; background: var(--white); }
    #chi-siamo .container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; }
    .about-visual {
      position: relative;
    }
    .about-img-box {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-mid), var(--blue-light));
      border-radius: 20px; padding: 48px 36px; color: white; min-height: 360px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 24px;
    }
    .about-img-box h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .about-img-box p  { font-size: 0.95rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); line-height: 1.7; }
    .about-badge-float {
      position: absolute; bottom: -20px; right: -20px;
      background: var(--cyan); color: var(--blue-dark); padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 14px;
      font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,200,224,0.35);
    }
    .about-badge-float .big { font-size: 1.8rem; display: block; }
    .about-values { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-top: 36px; }
    .value-card {
      background: var(--gray-bg); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;
      border-left: 4px solid var(--cyan);
    }
    .value-card h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--blue-main); }
    .value-card p  { font-size: 0.87rem; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.6; }
    .team-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; margin-top: 32px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .team-card {
      background: var(--gray-bg); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; flex: 1; min-width: 130px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .team-avatar { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--blue-light),var(--cyan));
                   margin: 0 auto 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
                   font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: white; }
    .team-card h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .team-card p  { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gray-text); }

    /* =====================================================
       PRODOTTI
    ===================================================== */
    #prodotti { padding: 100px 0; background: var(--gray-bg); }
    #prodotti > .container > .section-intro { margin-bottom: 60px; }
    .products-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 28px; }
    .product-card {
      background: var(--white); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: transform .25s, box-shadow .25s;
    }
    .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
    .product-card-img {
      height: 180px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 3.5rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .product-card-img .bg-circle {
      position: absolute; width: 180px; height: 180px; border-radius: 50%;
      top: -40px; right: -40px; opacity: 0.15;
    }
    .product-card-body { padding: 24px; }
    .product-card-body h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .product-card-body p  { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .product-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .product-tag { background: var(--gray-mid); color: var(--blue-main); font-size: 0.75rem;
                   font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; }
    .product-link { color: var(--blue-light); font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .product-link::after { content: '→'; transition: transform .2s; }
    .product-card:hover .product-link::after { transform: translateX(4px); }

    /* product colors */
    .pc-blue  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f1fd, #c5d9f8); }
    .pc-cyan  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f9fc, #b0f0f8); }
    .pc-teal  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f4f0, #a8e6da); }
    .pc-purple{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ede8fb, #c9bdf4); }
    .pc-orange{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef3e8, #fdd4a8); }
    .pc-green { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f8ee, #b0e8c4); }

    /* =====================================================
       BUSINESS PLAN
    ===================================================== */
    #business-plan { padding: 100px 0; background: var(--white); }
    #business-plan .container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr; gap: 70px; align-items: start; }
    .bp-left h2 { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.5vw, 2.2rem); font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .bp-left p  { color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .bp-features { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
    .bp-feature { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .bp-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--gray-bg);
               flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.2rem;
               border: 1px solid var(--gray-mid); }
    .bp-feature-text h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .bp-feature-text p  { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.6; }

    .bp-plans { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
    .plan-card {
      border: 2px solid var(--gray-mid); border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; position: relative;
      transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s;
    }
    .plan-card:hover { border-color: var(--blue-light); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(21,87,176,0.1); }
    .plan-card.featured {
      border-color: var(--cyan); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0fbfd, #e0f9fc);
      box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(0,200,224,0.18);
    }
    .plan-badge { position: absolute; top: -13px; right: 20px; background: var(--cyan);
                  color: var(--blue-dark); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800;
                  padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; }
    .plan-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .plan-card .plan-price { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--blue-main); }
    .plan-card .plan-price span { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--gray-text); font-weight: 400; }
    .plan-card .plan-desc { color: var(--gray-text); font-size: 0.87rem; margin: 10px 0 16px; line-height: 1.6; }
    .plan-features-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .plan-features-list li { font-size: 0.87rem; display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; }
    .plan-features-list li::before { content: '✓'; color: var(--cyan); font-weight: 900; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .plan-card .btn-primary, .plan-card .btn-outline { width: 100%; text-align: center; }

    /* =====================================================
       RICERCA CLIENTI
    ===================================================== */
    #ricerca-clienti { padding: 100px 0; background: var(--gray-bg); }
    #ricerca-clienti .container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 60px; }
    .rc-intro { max-width: 660px; }
    .rc-grid  { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .rc-card  {
      background: var(--white); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    }
    .rc-card .rc-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .rc-card h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--blue-main); }
    .rc-card p  { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .rc-steps { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
    .rc-step  { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .rc-step-num { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--cyan);
                   color: var(--blue-dark); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800;
                   flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
    .rc-step p { font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--gray-text); margin: 0; }

    /* CTA Banner */
    .rc-cta-banner {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-mid), var(--blue-main));
      border-radius: 20px; padding: 56px 56px; display: flex;
      align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .rc-cta-banner h2 { color: var(--white); font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 2rem); font-weight: 800; max-width: 540px; }
    .rc-cta-banner p  { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
    .cta-buttons { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn-white { display: inline-block; background: var(--white); color: var(--blue-main);
                 padding: 13px 32px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.95rem;
                 transition: background .2s, transform .2s; }
    .btn-white:hover { background: var(--cyan); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .btn-ghost { display: inline-block; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
                 border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: var(--white);
                 padding: 11px 28px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; transition: all .2s; }
    .btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }

    /* Customer form */
    .rc-form-wrapper {
      background: var(--white); border-radius: 20px; padding: 48px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    }
    .rc-form-wrapper h3 { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .rc-form-wrapper p  { color: var(--gray-text); margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
    .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
    .form-group.full { grid-column: 1/-1; }
    .form-group label { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue-dark); }
    .form-group input,
    .form-group select,
    .form-group textarea {
      border: 1.5px solid var(--gray-mid); border-radius: 8px; padding: 11px 14px;
      font-size: 0.93rem; font-family: var(--font-main); color: var(--blue-dark);
      outline: none; transition: border-color .2s;
    }
    .form-group input:focus,
    .form-group select:focus,
    .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--blue-light); }
    .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 110px; }
    .form-submit { margin-top: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .form-note { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gray-text); }

    /* Testimonials */
    .testimonials { margin-top: 20px; }
    .testimonials h3 { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .testi-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 22px; }
    .testi-card {
      background: var(--white); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px;
      box-shadow: 0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-top: 4px solid var(--cyan);
    }
    .testi-stars { color: #f5c518; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .testi-text  { font-size: 0.87rem; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 16px; font-style: italic; }
    .testi-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
    .testi-avatar { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%;
                    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-main), var(--cyan));
                    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
                    font-weight: 800; color: white; font-size: 0.85rem; }
    .testi-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.88rem; }
    .testi-role { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gray-text); }

    /* =====================================================
       PARTNERS / LOGOS
    ===================================================== */
    #partners { padding: 60px 0; background: var(--white); border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-mid); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-mid); }
    #partners .container { text-align: center; }
    #partners p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--gray-text); letter-spacing: 0.08em;
                  text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .logos-row { display: flex; gap: 36px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
    .logo-placeholder {
      background: var(--gray-bg); border: 1.5px solid var(--gray-mid); border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 14px 28px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #9aa8b8;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    }

    /* =====================================================
       STATS BAR
    ===================================================== */
    #stats { padding: 70px 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-dark), var(--blue-mid)); }
    #stats .container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
    .stat-item { text-align: center; }
    .stat-item .sn { font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--cyan); }
    .stat-item .sl { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); margin-top: 6px; }

    /* =====================================================
       FOOTER
    ===================================================== */
    footer { background: var(--blue-dark); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
    .footer-main { padding: 70px 0 48px; }
    .footer-main .container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .footer-brand h3 { color: var(--white); font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .footer-brand p  { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.75; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .social-links { display: flex; gap: 12px; }
    .social-btn { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
                  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.95rem;
                  transition: background .2s; cursor: pointer; }
    .social-btn:hover { background: var(--cyan); color: var(--blue-dark); }
    .footer-col h4 { color: var(--white); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700;
                     margin-bottom: 18px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
    .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
    .footer-col ul li a { font-size: 0.87rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); transition: color .2s; }
    .footer-col ul li a:hover { color: var(--cyan); }
    .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding: 20px 0; }
    .footer-bottom .container { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; }
    .footer-bottom p { font-size: 0.83rem; }

    /* =====================================================
       RESPONSIVE
    ===================================================== */
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .testi-grid    { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      #stats .container { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .footer-main .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .hero .container     { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .hero-visual         { display: none; }
      #chi-siamo .container{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      #business-plan .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .products-grid       { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .rc-grid             { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .form-grid           { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .testi-grid          { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .rc-cta-banner       { padding: 36px 28px; }
      .rc-form-wrapper     { padding: 28px; }
      .nav-links, .nav-cta { display: none; }
      .hamburger           { display: flex; }
      .about-badge-float   { right: 10px; bottom: -10px; }
      .footer-main .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>

            <a href="#" class="product-link">Scopri di più</a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ==================== STATS ==================== -->
  <section id="stats">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="stat-item"><div class="sn">500+</div><div class="sl">Città nel Mondo</div></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><div class="sn">10M+</div><div class="sl">Posti Monitorati</div></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><div class="sn">98%</div><div class="sl">Soddisfazione Cliente</div></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><div class="sn">40%</div><div class="sl">Riduzione CO₂</div></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ==================== BUSINESS PLAN ==================== -->
  <section id="business-plan">
    <div class="container">
      <!-- left -->
      <div class="bp-left">
        <div class="section-tag">Business Plan</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Il Piano Giusto per Ogni Realtà Urbana</h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <p>Che tu gestisca un piccolo parcheggio comunale o una rete metropolitana di migliaia di posti, abbiamo un piano su misura per le tue esigenze operative e di budget.</p>

        <div class="bp-features">
          <div class="bp-feature">
            <div class="bp-icon">⚙️</div>
            <div class="bp-feature-text">
              <h4>Implementazione Rapida</h4>
              <p>Go-live in meno di 30 giorni con supporto dedicato all'onboarding e training del personale.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="bp-feature">
            <div class="bp-icon">📊</div>
            <div class="bp-feature-text">
              <h4>ROI Misurabile</h4>
              <p>I nostri clienti riportano un ritorno sull'investimento medio del 180% entro il primo anno.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="bp-feature">
            <div class="bp-icon">🔒</div>
            <div class="bp-feature-text">
              <h4>Contratti Flessibili</h4>
              <p>Mensile, annuale o enterprise custom. Nessun lock-in: sei libero di scalare o disdire in qualsiasi momento.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="bp-feature">
            <div class="bp-icon">🌐</div>
            <div class="bp-feature-text">
              <h4>Supporto 24/7</h4>
              <p>Team di supporto tecnico dedicato con SLA garantiti per i piani Professional ed Enterprise.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- right: pricing cards -->
      <div class="bp-plans">

        <div class="plan-card">
          <h3>🌱 Starter</h3>
          <div class="plan-price">€290 <span>/ mese</span></div>
          <p class="plan-desc">Perfetto per parcheggi di quartiere, comuni piccoli o pilota sperimentali fino a 100 posti.</p>
          <ul class="plan-features-list">
            <li>Fino a 100 sensori IoT</li>
            <li>Dashboard cloud base</li>
            <li>App mPark inclusa</li>
            <li>Report mensile automatico</li>
            <li>Supporto via email (72h)</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#ricerca-clienti" class="btn-outline">Inizia la prova gratuita</a>
        </div>

        <div class="plan-card featured">
          <div class="plan-badge">⭐ Più Popolare</div>
          <h3>🚀 Professional</h3>
          <div class="plan-price">€890 <span>/ mese</span></div>
          <p class="plan-desc">La scelta dei comuni di medie dimensioni e degli operatori privati con 100–1.000 posti da gestire.</p>
          <ul class="plan-features-list">
            <li>Fino a 1.000 sensori IoT</li>
            <li>Dashboard avanzata + AI Engine</li>
            <li>Totem LED inclusi (fino a 5)</li>
            <li>Integrazione con sistemi comunali</li>
            <li>Analytics predittivo</li>
            <li>Supporto prioritario 24/7</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#ricerca-clienti" class="btn-primary">Richiedi Demo</a>
        </div>

        <div class="plan-card">
          <h3>🏙 Enterprise</h3>
          <div class="plan-price">Custom <span>/ anno</span></div>
          <p class="plan-desc">Per grandi città, reti metropolitane e operatori con esigenze specifiche e volume superiore a 1.000 posti.</p>
          <ul class="plan-features-list">
            <li>Sensori illimitati</li>
            <li>Piattaforma white-label</li>
            <li>AI Traffic Engine dedicato</li>
            <li>Integration Gateway full</li>
            <li>SLA 99.9% garantito</li>
            <li>Account manager dedicato</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="#ricerca-clienti" class="btn-outline">Contatta le Vendite</a>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ==================== RICERCA CLIENTI ==================== -->
  <section id="ricerca-clienti">
    <div class="container">

      <!-- intro -->
      <div class="rc-intro">
        <div class="section-tag">Ricerca Clienti</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Lavoriamo Insieme per Trovare la Soluzione Ideale</h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <p class="section-sub">Non vendiamo prodotti preconfezionati. Il nostro processo inizia ascoltando le esigenze specifiche della tua città o organizzazione — per costruire una soluzione che funziona davvero.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- how we work -->
      <div class="rc-grid">
        <div class="rc-card">
          <div class="rc-icon">🔍</div>
          <h3>Analisi delle Esigenze</h3>
          <p>Ogni progetto parte da un'analisi approfondita del contesto urbano, dei flussi di traffico esistenti e degli obiettivi dell'amministrazione o dell'operatore.</p>
          <div class="rc-steps">
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">1</div><p>Raccolta dati sul territorio (superficie, volume, picchi)</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">2</div><p>Intervista con responsabili tecnici e amministrativi</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">3</div><p>Analisi dei sistemi preesistenti e compatibilità</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-card">
          <div class="rc-icon">🎯</div>
          <h3>Profilazione Cliente Ideale</h3>
          <p>Identifichiamo il profilo ottimale per ciascuna soluzione: comuni, operatori privati, centri commerciali, aeroporti, ospedali, università.</p>
          <div class="rc-steps">
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">1</div><p>Segmentazione per dimensione (posti auto gestiti)</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">2</div><p>Budget e capacità di investimento tecnologico</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">3</div><p>Livello di maturità digitale dell'organizzazione</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-card">
          <div class="rc-icon">📐</div>
          <h3>Progettazione su Misura</h3>
          <p>In base al profilo emerso, il nostro team tecnico progetta la configurazione hardware/software ottimale con un piano di deployment dettagliato.</p>
          <div class="rc-steps">
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">1</div><p>Scelta del mix di sensori e infrastruttura</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">2</div><p>Configurazione piattaforma cloud e integrazioni</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">3</div><p>Presentazione proposta tecnico-economica</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-card">
          <div class="rc-icon">📈</div>
          <h3>Monitoraggio e Ottimizzazione</h3>
          <p>Il nostro rapporto non finisce all'installazione. Monitoriamo le performance in continuo e ottimizziamo la soluzione nel tempo con aggiornamenti periodici.</p>
          <div class="rc-steps">
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">1</div><p>KPI tracking mensile e quarterly review</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">2</div><p>Aggiornamenti firmware e software automatici</p></div>
            <div class="rc-step"><div class="rc-step-num">3</div><p>Espansione graduale della rete sensori</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- contact form -->
      <div class="rc-form-wrapper">
        <h3>Inizia la Tua Ricerca</h3>
        <p>Compila il modulo per ricevere una consulenza gratuita dal nostro team di esperti in mobilità urbana.</p>
        <form onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); alert('Grazie! Ti contatteremo entro 24 ore.');">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="nome">Nome e Cognome *</label>
              <input type="text" id="nome" placeholder="Es. Mario Rossi" required />
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="email">Email *</label>
              <input type="email" id="email" placeholder="mario@comune.it" required />
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="org">Organizzazione</label>
              <input type="text" id="org" placeholder="Es. Comune di Roma" />
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="ruolo">Ruolo</label>
              <input type="text" id="ruolo" placeholder="Es. Responsabile Mobilità" />
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="tipo">Tipo di Organizzazione</label>
              <select id="tipo">
                <option value="">— Seleziona —</option>
                <option>Comune / Ente Pubblico</option>
                <option>Operatore Privato</option>
                <option>Centro Commerciale</option>
                <option>Aeroporto / Hub</option>
                <option>Università / Ospedale</option>
                <option>Altro</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label for="posti">N° Posti da Gestire (stimato)</label>
              <select id="posti">
                <option value="">— Seleziona —</option>
                <option>Meno di 100</option>
                <option>100 – 500</option>
                <option>500 – 2.000</option>
                <option>2.000 – 10.000</option>
                <option>Oltre 10.000</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group full">
              <label for="msg">Descrivici la tua sfida o progetto</label>
              <textarea id="msg" placeholder="Es. Vogliamo digitalizzare il parcheggio del centro storico per ridurre il traffico di ricerca posto..."></textarea>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-submit">
            <button type="submit" class="btn-primary">Invia la Richiesta →</button>
            <span class="form-note">🔒 I tuoi dati sono trattati nel rispetto del GDPR. Risposta garantita entro 24h.</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>

      <!-- testimonials -->
      <div class="testimonials">
        <h3>Cosa Dicono i Nostri Clienti</h3>
        <div class="testi-grid">
          <div class="testi-card">
            <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="testi-text">"Abbiamo ridotto del 35% il traffico di ricerca posto nel centro storico. La piattaforma è intuitiva e il supporto è eccellente."</p>
            <div class="testi-author">
              <div class="testi-avatar">MR</div>
              <div><div class="testi-name">Marco Ricci</div><div class="testi-role">Comune di Bergamo — Mob. Urbana</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="testi-card">
            <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
            <p class="testi-text">"L'integrazione con il nostro sistema ERP è stata completata in soli 5 giorni. Il ROI si è materializzato già nel quarto mese."</p>
            <div class="testi-author">
              <div class="testi-avatar">SF</div>
              <div><div class="testi-name">Sofia Ferrari</div><div class="testi-role">ParkingPlus Srl — Direttore Ops</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="testi-card">
            <div class="testi-stars">★★★★☆</div>
            <p class="testi-text">"I dati predittivi ci hanno permesso di riallocare il personale in modo molto più efficiente. Siamo molto soddisfatti della partnership."</p>
            <div class="testi-author">
              <div class="testi-avatar">AL</div>
              <div><div class="testi-name">Andrea Longo</div><div class="testi-role">Aeroporto di Napoli — IT Manager</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CTA Banner -->
      <div class="rc-cta-banner">
        <div>
          <h2>Pronto a Trasformare la Mobilità della Tua Città?</h2>
          <p>Prenota una demo gratuita di 30 minuti con un nostro esperto — senza impegno.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="cta-buttons">
          <a href="#" class="btn-white">Prenota Demo</a>
          <a href="tel:+39000000000" class="btn-ghost">📞 Chiamaci ora</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ==================== FOOTER ==================== -->
  <footer>
    <div class="footer-main">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="footer-brand">
          <h3>WisdomEP</h3>
          <p>Soluzioni IoT di nuova generazione per parcheggi intelligenti e mobilità urbana sostenibile. Presente in oltre 500 città nel mondo.</p>
          <div class="social-links">
            <div class="social-btn" title="LinkedIn">in</div>

            <div class="social-btn" title="YouTube">▶</div>
            <div class="social-btn" title="WeChat">💬</div>
          </div>

        <div class="footer-col">
          <h4>Azienda</h4>
          <ul>

        <div class="footer-col">
          <h4>Prodotti</h4>

            <li><a href="#prodotti">P-IOTEYE Sensor</a></li>
