<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Trivium — Where Paths Converge</title>
<style>
/* ========== ROOT VARS ========== */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --white:#ffffff;
  --off-white:#f8faff;
  --blue-50:#eff6ff;
  --blue-100:#dbeafe;
  --blue-200:#bfdbfe;
  --azure:#0ea5e9;
  --azure-mid:#0284c7;
  --azure-deep:#0c4a6e;
  --navy:#0c1a2e;
  --navy2:#0f2340;
  --gray:#64748b;
  --gray-light:#94a3b8;
  --border:#e0eeff;
  --border2:rgba(14,165,233,0.2);
  --font:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;
  --shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.12);
  --shadow-lg:0 12px 48px rgba(14,165,233,0.18);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--white);color:var(--navy);overflow-x:hidden;}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}

/* ========== CANVAS ========== */
#cvs{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.5;}

/* ========== UTILITY ========== */
.wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(14,165,233,0.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.25);color:var(--azure-mid);
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:5px 15px;border-radius:30px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.chip .blink{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;
  animation:blk 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes blk{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(1.6);}}
.h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.2vw,2.8rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.12;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--navy);}
.h2 em{color:var(--azure);font-style:normal;}
.lead{font-size:1.02rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.8;max-width:620px;}
.bar{width:48px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure),var(--blue-200));border-radius:3px;margin:0 0 28px;}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:8px;
  font-weight:700;font-size:.93rem;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .25s;}
.btn-blue{background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(14,165,233,0.3);}
.btn-blue:hover{background:var(--azure-mid);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(14,165,233,0.4);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;border:2px solid var(--azure);color:var(--azure);}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);}
.btn-white{background:var(--white);color:var(--azure-mid);font-weight:800;}
.btn-white:hover{background:var(--blue-100);}

/* reveal */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease;}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.rv.d1{transition-delay:.1s;}
.rv.d2{transition-delay:.2s;}
.rv.d3{transition-delay:.3s;}
.rv.d4{transition-delay:.4s;}

/* ========== TOPBAR ========== */
.topbar{background:var(--navy);padding:7px 0;}
.topbar .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.topbar p{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);}
.topbar p a{color:var(--azure);margin:0 5px;}
.topbar-r{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:.8rem;}
.topbar-r a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);transition:color .2s;}
.topbar-r a:hover,.topbar-r a.on{color:var(--azure);}

/* ========== NAVBAR ========== */
.nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(14,165,233,0.07);}
.nav .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:66px;}
.nav-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;}
.nav-icon{width:38px;height:38px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--azure-mid),var(--azure));
  border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.nav-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;}
.brand-text{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:.03em;}
.brand-text span{color:var(--azure);}
.brand-sub{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--gray-light);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;}
.nav-ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:28px;}
.nav-ul a{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);font-weight:500;padding:5px 0;
  border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;}
.nav-ul a:hover,.nav-ul a.on{color:var(--azure);border-bottom-color:var(--azure);}
.nav-act{display:flex;gap:10px;}
.burger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;}
.burger span{display:block;width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:2px;}

/* ========== HERO ========== */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,var(--navy2) 40%,#0a2540 100%);}
/* animated grid */
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,233,.08) 1px,transparent 1px),
                   linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(14,165,233,.08) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:50px 50px;}
/* glow blobs */
.blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none;}
.blob1{width:600px;height:600px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);top:-200px;right:-150px;}
.blob2{width:400px;height:400px;background:rgba(2,132,199,.1);bottom:-100px;left:-100px;}
.hero .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;
  padding-top:60px;padding-bottom:60px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);
  color:var(--azure);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;
  padding:6px 16px;border-radius:30px;margin-bottom:20px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.hero-badge .pulse{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.5);animation:ripple 1.5s infinite;}
@keyframes ripple{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.5);}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,0);}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,0);}}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--white);line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:20px;}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--azure);font-style:normal;display:block;}
#typed-text{border-right:3px solid var(--azure);padding-right:4px;animation:caret .7s step-end infinite;}
@keyframes caret{50%{border-color:transparent;}}
.hero-desc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:34px;max-width:500px;}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:46px;}
.hero-trust{display:flex;gap:28px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding-top:26px;}
.ht-item{text-align:center;}
.ht-n{font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.ht-l{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:3px;letter-spacing:.04em;}

/* Hero Right — Tech Dashboard Visual */
.hero-visual{animation:floatHero 5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes floatHero{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}}
.dash-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  border-radius:20px;padding:24px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);}
.dash-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.dash-title span{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.dash-live{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);
  color:var(--azure);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;}
.dash-live::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;animation:blk 1s infinite;}
/* Mini map grid */
.map-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.ms{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.55rem;font-weight:700;transition:transform .2s;}
.ms:hover{transform:scale(1.3);}
.ms.f{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);color:var(--azure);}
.ms.o{background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.35);color:#f87171;}
.ms.r{background:rgba(250,204,21,.15);border:1px solid rgba(250,204,21,.35);color:#fde047;}
.ms.d{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.35);color:#86efac;}
.legend-row{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.leg{font-size:.7rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.leg::before{content:'';width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.lf::before{background:var(--azure);}
.lo::before{background:#f87171;}
.lr::before{background:#fde047;}
.ld::before{background:#86efac;}
.mini-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;}
.ms-pill{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:8px;padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;}
.ms-v{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--azure);}
.ms-l{font-size:.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-top:2px;}

/* ========== PROBLEM SECTION ========== */
#problem{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.problem-video{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;}
.problem-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.problem-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,26,46,.92) 0%,rgba(10,37,64,.88) 100%);z-index:1;}
.problem-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:110px 0;}
.problem-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:70px;align-items:center;margin-top:50px;}
.prob-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
.pstat{background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  border-radius:14px;padding:24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.pstat::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:100px;height:100px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(14,165,233,.15) 0%,transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;}
.pstat .sn{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.pstat .sl{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.5;}
.problem-text h2{color:var(--white);}
.problem-text .lead{color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);}
.fact-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin-top:28px;}
.fact{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;}
.fact-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.95rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.fact h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3px;}
.fact p{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);line-height:1.5;}

/* ========== TECH SCHEMA ========== */
#schema{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.schema-wrap{margin-top:60px;}
.schema-diagram{position:relative;padding:48px 0;}

/* animated SVG diagram */
.schema-svg{width:100%;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;display:block;}
.schema-node{transition:transform .2s;}
.schema-node:hover{transform:scale(1.04);}
/* flow line animation */
.flow-line{stroke-dasharray:8 6;animation:dash 2s linear infinite;}
@keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-28;}}
.flow-line2{stroke-dasharray:6 8;animation:dash 2.5s linear infinite reverse;}

/* Feature cards under diagram */
.schema-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:50px;}
.sc-card{background:var(--off-white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;
  padding:24px;text-align:center;transition:all .25s;cursor:default;}
.sc-card:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.sc-card .icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;margin:0 auto 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;}
.sc-card h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:7px;}
.sc-card p{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;}

/* ========== VIDEO PRODUCTS ========== */
#products{padding:110px 0;background:var(--blue-50);}
.prod-intro{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:60px;}
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
.vcard{border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--white);
  border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;position:relative;}
.vcard:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border-color:var(--azure);}
.vcard-media{height:220px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--navy);}
.vcard-media video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s;}
.vcard:hover .vcard-media video{transform:scale(1.04);}
/* overlay always on video to hide original text */
.vcard-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(12,26,46,.3) 0%,rgba(12,26,46,.7) 100%);}
.vcard-badge{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.06em;z-index:2;}
.vcard-body{padding:22px;}
.vcard-body h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.vcard-body p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:14px;}
.vcard-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.vtag{background:var(--blue-100);color:var(--azure-mid);font-size:.71rem;
  font-weight:600;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;}
.vcard-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:var(--azure);
  font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;transition:gap .2s;}
.vcard:hover .vcard-link{gap:10px;}

/* ========== HOW IT WORKS ========== */
#how{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.steps-header{text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 60px;}
.steps-header .lead{margin:0 auto;}
.steps-flow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:0;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;position:relative;}
/* connector lines */
.steps-flow::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:36px;left:calc(10%);right:calc(10%);
  height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure),var(--blue-200),var(--azure));
  background-size:200% 100%;animation:flowline 3s linear infinite;}
@keyframes flowline{0%{background-position:0 0;}100%{background-position:200% 0;}}
.step{text-align:center;padding:0 12px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.step-num{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--azure);
  margin:0 auto 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(14,165,233,.08),0 4px 16px rgba(14,165,233,.2);
  transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;}
.step:hover .step-num{transform:scale(1.12);box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,.1),0 8px 28px rgba(14,165,233,.3);}
.step h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:7px;}
.step p{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;}

/* ========== DATA SECTION ========== */
#data{padding:110px 0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,var(--navy2) 100%);}
.data-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:50px;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;}
/* Animated chart */
.chart-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.2);
  border-radius:18px;padding:28px;}
.chart-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px;}
.chart-head h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.chart-period{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.cp{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:.72rem;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.cp.active,.cp:hover{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border-color:var(--azure);color:var(--azure);}
/* bar chart */
.bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px;height:140px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.bar-item{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.bar-fill{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(to top,var(--azure-mid),var(--azure));
  border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;min-height:4px;transition:height .8s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
.bar-lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);}
.chart-meta{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);margin-top:8px;}
/* Occupancy donut */
.donut-wrap{display:flex;gap:24px;align-items:center;margin-top:24px;}
.donut-svg{flex-shrink:0;}
.donut-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.di{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;}
.di-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.di span{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);}
.di strong{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--white);margin-left:auto;}
/* Metric cards */
.metrics-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.metric-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  border-radius:14px;padding:22px;display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;transition:all .2s;}
.metric-card:hover{border-color:var(--azure);background:rgba(14,165,233,.06);}
.mc-icon{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.mc-label{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:5px;}
.mc-val{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.mc-trend{font-size:.75rem;margin-top:4px;}
.mc-trend.up{color:#4ade80;}
.mc-trend.down{color:#f87171;}

/* ========== STATS BAR ========== */
#statsbar{padding:70px 0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure-deep),var(--azure-mid));}
#statsbar .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;}
.stb{text-align:center;padding:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);transition:all .2s;}
.stb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);}
.stb .n{font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);}
.stb .l{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);margin-top:6px;}

/* ========== BUSINESS PLAN ========== */
#plans{padding:110px 0;background:var(--blue-50);}
.plans-header{text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 16px;}
.plans-header .lead{margin:0 auto;}
.billing-toggle{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;margin:28px 0 48px;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--gray);}
.tog{width:50px;height:28px;background:var(--blue-200);border-radius:30px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:background .3s;}
.tog.on{background:var(--azure);}
.tog::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:4px;left:4px;width:20px;height:20px;
  border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.2);transition:transform .3s;}
.tog.on::after{transform:translateX(22px);}
.save-tag{background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  color:var(--azure-mid);font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;}
.billing-toggle span.active{color:var(--navy);font-weight:700;}
.plans-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
.plan{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  padding:32px;position:relative;transition:all .25s;}
.plan:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.plan.top{border-color:var(--azure);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#f0f9ff);
  box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(14,165,233,.15);}
.plan-mark{position:absolute;top:-13px;right:20px;background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.06em;}
.plan h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.plan .price{font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure-mid);}
.plan .price sub{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);font-weight:400;}
.plan .pdesc{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--gray);margin:10px 0 20px;line-height:1.6;}
.plan-feats{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-bottom:26px;}
.plan-feats li{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--navy);display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;}
.plan-feats li::before{content:'✓';width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);color:var(--azure);font-weight:900;font-size:.75rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.plan .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center;}

/* ========== CONTACT ========== */
#contact{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.4fr;gap:50px;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;}
.ci-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;margin-top:28px;}
.citem{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;padding:18px;
  background:var(--off-white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;transition:all .2s;}
.citem:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.ci-ico{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--blue-100),var(--blue-200));
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.ci-txt h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);}
.ci-txt p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:2px;}
/* form */
.form-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  padding:38px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.form-card h3{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:6px;}
.form-card p{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:28px;}
.fg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.fg label{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);}
.fg input,.fg select,.fg textarea{
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 14px;
  font-size:.9rem;color:var(--navy);font-family:var(--font);outline:none;
  background:var(--off-white);transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.fg input:focus,.fg select:focus,.fg textarea:focus{border-color:var(--azure);background:var(--white);
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,.1);}
.fg textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px;}
.fgrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
.fsub{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.fnote{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--gray-light);}

/* ========== CTA BAND ========== */
.cta-band{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.cta-band video{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;z-index:0;}
.cta-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,74,110,.93),rgba(2,132,199,.85));z-index:1;}
.cta-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:90px 0;text-align:center;}
.cta-content h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,3rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:16px;}
.cta-content p{font-size:1.05rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);margin-bottom:36px;max-width:600px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}

/* ========== FOOTER ========== */
footer{background:var(--navy);color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
.foot-main{padding:70px 0 50px;}
.foot-main .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px;}
.fb h3{color:var(--white);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:12px;}
.fb p{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:20px;}
.soc-row{display:flex;gap:10px;}
.soc{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.85rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.soc:hover{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border-color:var(--azure);}
.fc h4{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;
  padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);}
.fc ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;}
.fc ul li a{font-size:.84rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);transition:color .2s;}
.fc ul li a:hover{color:var(--azure);}
.foot-btm{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding:20px 0;}
.foot-btm .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
.foot-btm p{font-size:.8rem;}
.foot-btm a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.8rem;margin-left:16px;transition:color .2s;}
.foot-btm a:hover{color:var(--azure);}

/* ========== RESPONSIVE ========== */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  #statsbar .wrap,.schema-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .plans-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .foot-main .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .steps-flow{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
  .steps-flow::before{display:none;}
  .data-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .hero .wrap,#problem .problem-grid,.prod-intro,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .hero-visual{display:none;}
  .nav-ul,.nav-act{display:none;}
  .burger{display:flex;}
  .prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .steps-flow{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .schema-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .fgrow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  #statsbar .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .foot-main .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="cvs"></canvas>

<!-- TOPBAR -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="wrap">
    <p>📞 <a href="#">+86 400-XXX-XXXX</a>  ·  ✉ <a href="#">contact@p-ioteye.com</a></p>
    <div class="topbar-r">
      <a href="#" class="on">EN</a><a href="#">中文</a><a href="#">IT</a>
      <a href="#">Partner Portal →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="nav">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <!-- Trivium Logo SVG -->
      <svg width="42" height="42" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0;">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="navLg" x1="0" y1="200" x2="200" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0090a8"/>
            <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#00b4c8"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00eeff"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <radialGradient id="navGlw" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00eeff"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00d4e8" stop-opacity="0"/>
          </radialGradient>
        </defs>
        <polygon points="100,14 191,169 9,169" stroke="url(#navLg)" stroke-width="7" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <polygon points="100,38 172,158 28,158" stroke="url(#navLg)" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity=".55"/>

        <span class="blink"></span> The Urban Parking Crisis
      </div>
      <h2 class="h2" style="color:white;max-width:600px;">The High Cost of <em style="color:#38bdf8;">Circling</em></h2>
      <div class="bar" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,transparent);"></div>

      <div class="problem-grid rv">
        <div>
          <div class="prob-stats">
            <div class="pstat rv d1"><div class="sn" data-count="30">0</div><span style="color:#38bdf8;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;">%</span><div class="sl">of urban traffic caused by<br>drivers searching for parking</div></div>
            <div class="pstat rv d2"><div class="sn" data-count="17">0</div><span style="color:#38bdf8;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;">min</span><div class="sl">average time wasted per<br>parking search per driver</div></div>

          </div>

            <div class="fact"><div class="fact-icon">🌍</div><div><h4>Environmental Cost</h4><p>Circling traffic is a top contributor to urban air quality degradation.</p></div></div>

<script>
// ===== PARTICLES (light blue on white) =====
const c=document.getElementById('cvs');
const cx=c.getContext('2d');
let W,H,pts=[];
function rs(){W=c.width=window.innerWidth;H=c.height=window.innerHeight;}
rs();window.addEventListener('resize',rs);
function rb(a,b){return Math.random()*(b-a)+a;}
for(let i=0;i<60;i++) pts.push({x:rb(0,W),y:rb(0,H),vx:rb(-.25,.25),vy:rb(-.25,.25),r:rb(1,2.5),o:rb(.06,.18)});
function drawPts(){
  cx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  pts.forEach((p,i)=>{
    pts.slice(i+1).forEach(q=>{
      const d=Math.hypot(p.x-q.x,p.y-q.y);
      if(d<130){cx.beginPath();cx.strokeStyle=`rgba(14,165,233,${.1*(1-d/130)})`;cx.lineWidth=.8;cx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);cx.lineTo(q.x,q.y);cx.stroke();}
    });
    cx.beginPath();cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    cx.fillStyle=`rgba(14,165,233,${p.o})`;cx.fill();
    p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;
    if(p.x<0||p.x>W)p.vx*=-1;if(p.y<0||p.y>H)p.vy*=-1;
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(drawPts);
}
drawPts();

// ===== TYPED HERO =====
const words=['Chaos','Complexity','Congestion','Lost Revenue'];
let wi=0,ci2=0,deleting=false;
function type(){
  const el=document.getElementById('typed-text');
  if(!el)return;
  const w=words[wi];
  if(!deleting){
    el.textContent=w.slice(0,++ci2);
    if(ci2===w.length){setTimeout(()=>{deleting=true;type();},1800);return;}
  }else{
    el.textContent=w.slice(0,--ci2);
    if(ci2===0){deleting=false;wi=(wi+1)%words.length;}
  }
  setTimeout(type,deleting?60:100);
}
type();

// ===== PARKING MAP LIVE =====
const slots=['f','o','f','f','r','o','f','f','o','f','d','f','o','f','f','r','f','o','f','d','f','f','o','f','f','f','o','f','d','f','r','f','f','o','f','f'];
const lbl={f:'',o:'',r:'',d:'EV'};
function buildMap(){
  const g=document.getElementById('mapGrid');
  if(!g)return;
  g.innerHTML='';
  slots.forEach(s=>{
    const d=document.createElement('div');
    d.className=`ms ${s}`;
    d.textContent=lbl[s];
    g.appendChild(d);
  });
}
buildMap();
// Random flicker
setInterval(()=>{
  const all=['f','o','f','f','r','d'];
  const i=Math.floor(Math.random()*slots.length);
  slots[i]=all[Math.floor(Math.random()*all.length)];
  buildMap();
  // update occ
  const o=slots.filter(s=>s==='o').length;
  const pct=Math.round(o/slots.length*100);
  const el=document.getElementById('occ-val');
  if(el)el.textContent=pct+'%';
  const r=document.getElementById('rev-val');
  if(r){const rv=Math.floor(800+Math.random()*200);r.textContent='€'+rv;}
},2200);

// ===== SCROLL REVEAL =====
const rvEls=document.querySelectorAll('.rv');
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.1});
rvEls.forEach(e=>obs.observe(e));

// ===== COUNTER ANIMATION =====
function animNum(el){
  const t=parseInt(el.dataset.count);
  let n=0;const step=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(t/55));
  const iv=setInterval(()=>{n=Math.min(n+step,t);el.textContent=n+(t>=100?'+':'');if(n>=t)clearInterval(iv);},22);
}
const cObs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{
  es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.querySelectorAll('[data-count]').forEach(animNum);cObs.unobserve(e.target);}});
},{threshold:.3});
document.querySelectorAll('.hero-trust,.prob-stats,#statsbar,.metrics-col,.data-grid').forEach(s=>cObs.observe(s));

// ===== BAR CHART =====
const barData7={labels:['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'],vals:[3200,4100,3800,4600,5100,4300,3700]};
const barData30={labels:['W1','W2','W3','W4'],vals:[22000,28000,25000,31000]};
const barData90={labels:['Jan','Feb','Mar'],vals:[85000,92000,110000]};
let cd=barData7;
function renderBars(){
  const ch=document.getElementById('barChart');
  if(!ch)return;
  const mx=Math.max(...cd.vals);
  ch.innerHTML='';
  cd.labels.forEach((l,i)=>{
    const pct=Math.round((cd.vals[i]/mx)*120);
    const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='bar-item';
    d.innerHTML=`<div class="bar-fill" style="height:${pct}px;"></div><span class="bar-lbl">${l}</span>`;
    ch.appendChild(d);
  });
}
function setPeriod(btn,key){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  cd=key==='7d'?barData7:key==='30d'?barData30:barData90;
  renderBars();
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',renderBars);
setTimeout(renderBars,200);

// ===== BILLING TOGGLE =====
let isY=true;
function togBill(){
  isY=!isY;
  const t=document.getElementById('bt');
  t.classList.toggle('on',isY);
  document.querySelectorAll('.pv').forEach(e=>{
    e.textContent='€'+(isY?e.dataset.y:e.dataset.m);
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.plan sub').forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.textContent.includes('contact')) e.textContent=isY?' /mo · billed annually':' /mo · billed monthly';
  });
}

// ===== NAVBAR ACTIVE =====
const secs=document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
const nls=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-ul a');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  let cur='';
  secs.forEach(s=>{if(pageYOffset>=s.offsetTop-130)cur=s.id;});
  nls.forEach(a=>{a.classList.toggle('on',a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+cur);});
});

// ===== FORM SUBMIT =====
function fSubmit(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const b=document.getElementById('fBtn');
  b.textContent='✓ Sent!';b.style.background='#059669';b.disabled=true;
  setTimeout(()=>{b.textContent='Send Request →';b.style.background='';b.disabled=false;e.target.reset();},3500);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Trivium — Where Paths Converge</title>
<style>
/* ========== ROOT VARS ========== */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --white:#ffffff;
  --off-white:#f8faff;
  --blue-50:#eff6ff;
  --blue-100:#dbeafe;
  --blue-200:#bfdbfe;
  --azure:#0ea5e9;
  --azure-mid:#0284c7;
  --azure-deep:#0c4a6e;
  --navy:#0c1a2e;
  --navy2:#0f2340;
  --gray:#64748b;
  --gray-light:#94a3b8;
  --border:#e0eeff;
  --border2:rgba(14,165,233,0.2);
  --font:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;
  --shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.12);
  --shadow-lg:0 12px 48px rgba(14,165,233,0.18);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--white);color:var(--navy);overflow-x:hidden;}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}

/* ========== CANVAS ========== */
#cvs{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.5;}

/* ========== UTILITY ========== */
.wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(14,165,233,0.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.25);color:var(--azure-mid);
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:5px 15px;border-radius:30px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.chip .blink{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;
  animation:blk 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes blk{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(1.6);}}
.h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.2vw,2.8rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.12;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--navy);}
.h2 em{color:var(--azure);font-style:normal;}
.lead{font-size:1.02rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.8;max-width:620px;}
.bar{width:48px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure),var(--blue-200));border-radius:3px;margin:0 0 28px;}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:8px;
  font-weight:700;font-size:.93rem;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .25s;}
.btn-blue{background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(14,165,233,0.3);}
.btn-blue:hover{background:var(--azure-mid);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(14,165,233,0.4);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;border:2px solid var(--azure);color:var(--azure);}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);}
.btn-white{background:var(--white);color:var(--azure-mid);font-weight:800;}
.btn-white:hover{background:var(--blue-100);}

/* reveal */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease;}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.rv.d1{transition-delay:.1s;}
.rv.d2{transition-delay:.2s;}
.rv.d3{transition-delay:.3s;}
.rv.d4{transition-delay:.4s;}

/* ========== TOPBAR ========== */
.topbar{background:var(--navy);padding:7px 0;}
.topbar .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.topbar p{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);}
.topbar p a{color:var(--azure);margin:0 5px;}
.topbar-r{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:.8rem;}
.topbar-r a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);transition:color .2s;}
.topbar-r a:hover,.topbar-r a.on{color:var(--azure);}

/* ========== NAVBAR ========== */
.nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(14,165,233,0.07);}
.nav .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:66px;}
.nav-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;}
.nav-icon{width:38px;height:38px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--azure-mid),var(--azure));
  border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.nav-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;}
.brand-text{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:.03em;}
.brand-text span{color:var(--azure);}
.brand-sub{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--gray-light);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;}
.nav-ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:28px;}
.nav-ul a{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);font-weight:500;padding:5px 0;
  border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;}
.nav-ul a:hover,.nav-ul a.on{color:var(--azure);border-bottom-color:var(--azure);}
.nav-act{display:flex;gap:10px;}
.burger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;}
.burger span{display:block;width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:2px;}

/* ========== HERO ========== */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,var(--navy2) 40%,#0a2540 100%);}
/* animated grid */
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,233,.08) 1px,transparent 1px),
                   linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(14,165,233,.08) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:50px 50px;}
/* glow blobs */
.blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none;}
.blob1{width:600px;height:600px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);top:-200px;right:-150px;}
.blob2{width:400px;height:400px;background:rgba(2,132,199,.1);bottom:-100px;left:-100px;}
.hero .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;
  padding-top:60px;padding-bottom:60px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);
  color:var(--azure);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;
  padding:6px 16px;border-radius:30px;margin-bottom:20px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.hero-badge .pulse{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.5);animation:ripple 1.5s infinite;}
@keyframes ripple{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.5);}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,0);}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,0);}}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--white);line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:20px;}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--azure);font-style:normal;display:block;}
#typed-text{border-right:3px solid var(--azure);padding-right:4px;animation:caret .7s step-end infinite;}
@keyframes caret{50%{border-color:transparent;}}
.hero-desc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:34px;max-width:500px;}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:46px;}
.hero-trust{display:flex;gap:28px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding-top:26px;}
.ht-item{text-align:center;}
.ht-n{font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.ht-l{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:3px;letter-spacing:.04em;}

/* Hero Right — Tech Dashboard Visual */
.hero-visual{animation:floatHero 5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes floatHero{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}}
.dash-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  border-radius:20px;padding:24px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);}
.dash-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.dash-title span{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.dash-live{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);
  color:var(--azure);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;}
.dash-live::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--azure);border-radius:50%;animation:blk 1s infinite;}
/* Mini map grid */
.map-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.ms{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.55rem;font-weight:700;transition:transform .2s;}
.ms:hover{transform:scale(1.3);}
.ms.f{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);color:var(--azure);}
.ms.o{background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.35);color:#f87171;}
.ms.r{background:rgba(250,204,21,.15);border:1px solid rgba(250,204,21,.35);color:#fde047;}
.ms.d{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.35);color:#86efac;}
.legend-row{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.leg{font-size:.7rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.leg::before{content:'';width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.lf::before{background:var(--azure);}
.lo::before{background:#f87171;}
.lr::before{background:#fde047;}
.ld::before{background:#86efac;}
.mini-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;}
.ms-pill{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:8px;padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;}
.ms-v{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--azure);}
.ms-l{font-size:.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-top:2px;}

/* ========== PROBLEM SECTION ========== */
#problem{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.problem-video{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;}
.problem-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.problem-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,26,46,.92) 0%,rgba(10,37,64,.88) 100%);z-index:1;}
.problem-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:110px 0;}
.problem-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:70px;align-items:center;margin-top:50px;}
.prob-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
.pstat{background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  border-radius:14px;padding:24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.pstat::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:100px;height:100px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(14,165,233,.15) 0%,transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;}
.pstat .sn{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.pstat .sl{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.5;}
.problem-text h2{color:var(--white);}
.problem-text .lead{color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);}
.fact-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin-top:28px;}
.fact{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;}
.fact-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.95rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.fact h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3px;}
.fact p{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);line-height:1.5;}

/* ========== TECH SCHEMA ========== */
#schema{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.schema-wrap{margin-top:60px;}
.schema-diagram{position:relative;padding:48px 0;}

/* animated SVG diagram */
.schema-svg{width:100%;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;display:block;}
.schema-node{transition:transform .2s;}
.schema-node:hover{transform:scale(1.04);}
/* flow line animation */
.flow-line{stroke-dasharray:8 6;animation:dash 2s linear infinite;}
@keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-28;}}
.flow-line2{stroke-dasharray:6 8;animation:dash 2.5s linear infinite reverse;}

/* Feature cards under diagram */
.schema-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:50px;}
.sc-card{background:var(--off-white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;
  padding:24px;text-align:center;transition:all .25s;cursor:default;}
.sc-card:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.sc-card .icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;margin:0 auto 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;}
.sc-card h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:7px;}
.sc-card p{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;}

/* ========== VIDEO PRODUCTS ========== */
#products{padding:110px 0;background:var(--blue-50);}
.prod-intro{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:60px;}
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
.vcard{border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--white);
  border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;position:relative;}
.vcard:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border-color:var(--azure);}
.vcard-media{height:220px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--navy);}
.vcard-media video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s;}
.vcard:hover .vcard-media video{transform:scale(1.04);}
/* overlay always on video to hide original text */
.vcard-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(12,26,46,.3) 0%,rgba(12,26,46,.7) 100%);}
.vcard-badge{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.06em;z-index:2;}
.vcard-body{padding:22px;}
.vcard-body h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.vcard-body p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:14px;}
.vcard-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.vtag{background:var(--blue-100);color:var(--azure-mid);font-size:.71rem;
  font-weight:600;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;}
.vcard-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:var(--azure);
  font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;transition:gap .2s;}
.vcard:hover .vcard-link{gap:10px;}

/* ========== HOW IT WORKS ========== */
#how{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.steps-header{text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 60px;}
.steps-header .lead{margin:0 auto;}
.steps-flow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:0;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;position:relative;}
/* connector lines */
.steps-flow::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:36px;left:calc(10%);right:calc(10%);
  height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure),var(--blue-200),var(--azure));
  background-size:200% 100%;animation:flowline 3s linear infinite;}
@keyframes flowline{0%{background-position:0 0;}100%{background-position:200% 0;}}
.step{text-align:center;padding:0 12px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.step-num{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--azure);
  margin:0 auto 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(14,165,233,.08),0 4px 16px rgba(14,165,233,.2);
  transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;}
.step:hover .step-num{transform:scale(1.12);box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,.1),0 8px 28px rgba(14,165,233,.3);}
.step h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:7px;}
.step p{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;}

/* ========== DATA SECTION ========== */
#data{padding:110px 0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,var(--navy2) 100%);}
.data-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:50px;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;}
/* Animated chart */
.chart-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.2);
  border-radius:18px;padding:28px;}
.chart-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px;}
.chart-head h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.chart-period{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.cp{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:.72rem;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.cp.active,.cp:hover{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border-color:var(--azure);color:var(--azure);}
/* bar chart */
.bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px;height:140px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.bar-item{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.bar-fill{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(to top,var(--azure-mid),var(--azure));
  border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;min-height:4px;transition:height .8s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
.bar-lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);}
.chart-meta{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);margin-top:8px;}
/* Occupancy donut */
.donut-wrap{display:flex;gap:24px;align-items:center;margin-top:24px;}
.donut-svg{flex-shrink:0;}
.donut-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.di{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;}
.di-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.di span{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);}
.di strong{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--white);margin-left:auto;}
/* Metric cards */
.metrics-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.metric-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  border-radius:14px;padding:22px;display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;transition:all .2s;}
.metric-card:hover{border-color:var(--azure);background:rgba(14,165,233,.06);}
.mc-icon{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.mc-label{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:5px;}
.mc-val{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure);}
.mc-trend{font-size:.75rem;margin-top:4px;}
.mc-trend.up{color:#4ade80;}
.mc-trend.down{color:#f87171;}

/* ========== STATS BAR ========== */
#statsbar{padding:70px 0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--azure-deep),var(--azure-mid));}
#statsbar .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;}
.stb{text-align:center;padding:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);transition:all .2s;}
.stb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);}
.stb .n{font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);}
.stb .l{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);margin-top:6px;}

/* ========== BUSINESS PLAN ========== */
#plans{padding:110px 0;background:var(--blue-50);}
.plans-header{text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 16px;}
.plans-header .lead{margin:0 auto;}
.billing-toggle{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;margin:28px 0 48px;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--gray);}
.tog{width:50px;height:28px;background:var(--blue-200);border-radius:30px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:background .3s;}
.tog.on{background:var(--azure);}
.tog::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:4px;left:4px;width:20px;height:20px;
  border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.2);transition:transform .3s;}
.tog.on::after{transform:translateX(22px);}
.save-tag{background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);
  color:var(--azure-mid);font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;}
.billing-toggle span.active{color:var(--navy);font-weight:700;}
.plans-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
.plan{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  padding:32px;position:relative;transition:all .25s;}
.plan:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.plan.top{border-color:var(--azure);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#f0f9ff);
  box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(14,165,233,.15);}
.plan-mark{position:absolute;top:-13px;right:20px;background:var(--azure);color:var(--white);
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.06em;}
.plan h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.plan .price{font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--azure-mid);}
.plan .price sub{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);font-weight:400;}
.plan .pdesc{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--gray);margin:10px 0 20px;line-height:1.6;}
.plan-feats{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-bottom:26px;}
.plan-feats li{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--navy);display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;}
.plan-feats li::before{content:'✓';width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(14,165,233,.12);color:var(--azure);font-weight:900;font-size:.75rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.plan .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center;}

/* ========== CONTACT ========== */
#contact{padding:110px 0;background:var(--white);}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.4fr;gap:50px;align-items:start;margin-top:50px;}
.ci-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;margin-top:28px;}
.citem{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;padding:18px;
  background:var(--off-white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;transition:all .2s;}
.citem:hover{border-color:var(--azure);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.ci-ico{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--blue-100),var(--blue-200));
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.ci-txt h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);}
.ci-txt p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:2px;}
/* form */
.form-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  padding:38px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.form-card h3{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:6px;}
.form-card p{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:28px;}
.fg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.fg label{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);}
.fg input,.fg select,.fg textarea{
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 14px;
  font-size:.9rem;color:var(--navy);font-family:var(--font);outline:none;
  background:var(--off-white);transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.fg input:focus,.fg select:focus,.fg textarea:focus{border-color:var(--azure);background:var(--white);
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,.1);}
.fg textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px;}
.fgrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
.fsub{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.fnote{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--gray-light);}

/* ========== CTA BAND ========== */
.cta-band{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.cta-band video{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;z-index:0;}
.cta-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,74,110,.93),rgba(2,132,199,.85));z-index:1;}
.cta-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:90px 0;text-align:center;}
.cta-content h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,3rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:16px;}
.cta-content p{font-size:1.05rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);margin-bottom:36px;max-width:600px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}

/* ========== FOOTER ========== */
footer{background:var(--navy);color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
.foot-main{padding:70px 0 50px;}
.foot-main .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px;}
.fb h3{color:var(--white);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:12px;}
.fb p{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:20px;}
.soc-row{display:flex;gap:10px;}
.soc{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.85rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.soc:hover{background:rgba(14,165,233,.2);border-color:var(--azure);}
.fc h4{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;
  padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);}
.fc ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;}
.fc ul li a{font-size:.84rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);transition:color .2s;}
.fc ul li a:hover{color:var(--azure);}
.foot-btm{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding:20px 0;}
.foot-btm .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
.foot-btm p{font-size:.8rem;}
.foot-btm a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.8rem;margin-left:16px;transition:color .2s;}
.foot-btm a:hover{color:var(--azure);}

/* ========== RESPONSIVE ========== */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  #statsbar .wrap,.schema-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .plans-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .foot-main .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .steps-flow{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
  .steps-flow::before{display:none;}
  .data-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .hero .wrap,#problem .problem-grid,.prod-intro,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .hero-visual{display:none;}
  .nav-ul,.nav-act{display:none;}
  .burger{display:flex;}
  .prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .steps-flow{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .schema-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .fgrow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  #statsbar .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .foot-main .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
</style>
</head>

<!-- HERO -->

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="problem-video">
    <video autoplay muted loop playsinline>
      <source src="../uploads/The_Science_of_the_Curb__version_1.mp4" type="video/mp4"/>
    </video>
  </div>
  <div class="problem-overlay"></div>
  <div class="problem-content">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="chip" style="background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);border-color:rgba(14,165,233,.3);color:#7dd3fc;">
        <span class="blink"></span> The Urban Parking Crisis
      </div>
      <h2 class="h2" style="color:white;max-width:600px;">The High Cost of <em style="color:#38bdf8;">Circling</em></h2>
      <div class="bar" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,transparent);"></div>

      <div class="problem-grid rv">
        <div>
          <div class="prob-stats">
            <div class="pstat rv d1"><div class="sn" data-count="30">0</div><span style="color:#38bdf8;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;">%</span><div class="sl">of urban traffic caused by<br>drivers searching for parking</div></div>
            <div class="pstat rv d2"><div class="sn" data-count="17">0</div><span style="color:#38bdf8;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;">min</span><div class="sl">average time wasted per<br>parking search per driver</div></div>
            <div class="pstat rv d3"><div class="sn">€4.2B</div><div class="sl">annual revenue lost globally<br>from unverified sessions</div></div>
            <div class="pstat rv d4"><div class="sn" data-count="40">0</div><span style="color:#38bdf8;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;">%</span><div class="sl">excess CO₂ emissions from<br>parking-related circling</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="problem-text rv">
          <p class="lead">Cities lose millions every year to inefficient parking management. Faulty detection, unverified sessions, and revenue leakage are systemic problems — until now.</p>
          <div class="fact-list">
            <div class="fact"><div class="fact-icon">📡</div><div><h4>No Real-Time Visibility</h4><p>Legacy systems can't detect occupancy changes faster than 5-minute intervals.</p></div></div>
            <div class="fact"><div class="fact-icon">💸</div><div><h4>Revenue Leakage</h4><p>Faulty sensors and unverified sessions drain 15–30% of parking revenue daily.</p></div></div>
            <div class="fact"><div class="fact-icon">🌍</div><div><h4>Environmental Cost</h4><p>Circling traffic is a top contributor to urban air quality degradation.</p></div></div>
          </div>
          <a href="#schema" class="btn btn-blue" style="margin-top:28px;">See Our Solution →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="schema">

      <p class="lead" style="margin:0 auto;">A fully integrated stack — from ground-level sensors to city-wide cloud intelligence — delivering sub-2-second data latency across thousands of spaces.</p>

        </defs>

        <!-- Layer labels -->

        <line x1="384" y1="35" x2="384" y2="265" stroke="#dbeafe" stroke-width="1.5"/>

        <!-- Edge Gateway -->

        <!-- AI Engine -->

          <text x="672" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22">🤖</text>
          <text x="672" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#0c4a6e" font-weight="700" font-family="Segoe UI,sans-serif">AI Engine</text>
          <text x="672" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#64748b" font-family="Segoe UI,sans-serif">ML Prediction</text>
          <circle cx="652" cy="182" r="4" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity=".6"/>
          <circle cx="672" cy="182" r="5" fill="#0ea5e9"/>
          <circle cx="692" cy="182" r="4" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity=".6"/>
        </g>

        <!-- Flow line 4 -->
        <line x1="732" y1="140" x2="784" y2="140" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2.5" class="flow-line2"/>
        <polygon points="784,135 794,140 784,145" fill="#0ea5e9"/>

        <!-- User Apps -->
        <g class="schema-node" filter="url(#glow2)">
          <rect x="794" y="80" width="140" height="120" rx="14" fill="url(#nodeGrad)"/>
          <text x="864" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" fill="white">📱</text>
          <text x="864" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-weight="700" font-family="Segoe UI,sans-serif">Apps & Dashboard</text>
          <text x="864" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.65)" font-family="Segoe UI,sans-serif">Mobile · Web · API</text>
          <text x="864" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.55)" font-family="Segoe UI,sans-serif">Real-time · <2s latency</text>
        </g>

                <option>Airport / Transport Hub</option>
                <option>Shopping Centre / Retail</option>
                <option>University / Hospital</option>
                <option>Other</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="fg"><label>Spaces to Manage</label>
              <select>
                <option>— Estimate —</option>
                <option>Under 100</option>
                <option>100 – 500</option>
                <option>500 – 2,000</option>
                <option>2,000 – 10,000</option>
                <option>10,000+</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Describe Your Project</label>
            <textarea placeholder="E.g. We need to digitise our on-street parking across 3 zones to reduce enforcement costs and improve turnover..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="fsub">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-blue" id="fBtn">Send Request →</button>
            <span class="fnote">🔒 GDPR compliant · Response within 4 hours</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="foot-main">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="fb">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <div class="nav-icon" style="width:32px;height:32px;">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" width="18" height="18"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 2v3M12 19v3M2 12h3M19 12h3"/><path d="M5.6 5.6l2.1 2.1M16.3 16.3l2.1 2.1M5.6 18.4l2.1-2.1M16.3 7.7l2.1-2.1"/></svg>
          </div>
          <span style="color:white;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;">P-IOTEYE<span style="color:var(--azure);">.</span></span>
        </div>
        <p>Next-generation IoT parking intelligence for smart cities. 500+ cities, 10M+ spaces monitored globally.</p>
        <div class="soc-row">
          <div class="soc">in</div><div class="soc">𝕏</div><div class="soc">▶</div><div class="soc">💬</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fc"><h4>Products</h4><ul><li><a href="#">SolarSense Pro</a></li><li><a href="#">CurbSight Tower</a></li><li><a href="#">OpticalEye AI</a></li><li><a href="#">PaveSense Nano</a></li><li><a href="#">DataGuard Edge</a></li><li><a href="#">City Command</a></li></ul></div>
      <div class="fc"><h4>Company</h4><ul><li><a href="#">About Us</a></li><li><a href="#">Team</a></li><li><a href="#">Careers</a></li><li><a href="#">Blog</a></li><li><a href="#">Press Kit</a></li></ul></div>
      <div class="fc"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="#">Documentation</a></li><li><a href="#">Developer API</a></li><li><a href="#">System Status</a></li><li><a href="#">Contact Sales</a></li><li><a href="#">GDPR Center</a></li></ul></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="foot-btm">
    <div class="wrap">
      <p>© 2026 P-IOTEYE Technology Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.</p>
      <div><a href="#">Privacy</a><a href="#">Cookies</a><a href="#">Terms</a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// ===== PARTICLES (light blue on white) =====
const c=document.getElementById('cvs');
const cx=c.getContext('2d');
let W,H,pts=[];
function rs(){W=c.width=window.innerWidth;H=c.height=window.innerHeight;}
rs();window.addEventListener('resize',rs);
function rb(a,b){return Math.random()*(b-a)+a;}
for(let i=0;i<60;i++) pts.push({x:rb(0,W),y:rb(0,H),vx:rb(-.25,.25),vy:rb(-.25,.25),r:rb(1,2.5),o:rb(.06,.18)});
function drawPts(){
  cx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  pts.forEach((p,i)=>{
    pts.slice(i+1).forEach(q=>{
      const d=Math.hypot(p.x-q.x,p.y-q.y);
      if(d<130){cx.beginPath();cx.strokeStyle=`rgba(14,165,233,${.1*(1-d/130)})`;cx.lineWidth=.8;cx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);cx.lineTo(q.x,q.y);cx.stroke();}
    });
    cx.beginPath();cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    cx.fillStyle=`rgba(14,165,233,${p.o})`;cx.fill();
    p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;
    if(p.x<0||p.x>W)p.vx*=-1;if(p.y<0||p.y>H)p.vy*=-1;
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(drawPts);
}
drawPts();

// ===== TYPED HERO =====
const words=['Chaos','Complexity','Congestion','Lost Revenue'];
let wi=0,ci2=0,deleting=false;
function type(){
  const el=document.getElementById('typed-text');
  if(!el)return;
  const w=words[wi];
  if(!deleting){
    el.textContent=w.slice(0,++ci2);
    if(ci2===w.length){setTimeout(()=>{deleting=true;type();},1800);return;}
  }else{
    el.textContent=w.slice(0,--ci2);
    if(ci2===0){deleting=false;wi=(wi+1)%words.length;}
  }
  setTimeout(type,deleting?60:100);
}
type();

// ===== PARKING MAP LIVE =====
const slots=['f','o','f','f','r','o','f','f','o','f','d','f','o','f','f','r','f','o','f','d','f','f','o','f','f','f','o','f','d','f','r','f','f','o','f','f'];
const lbl={f:'',o:'',r:'',d:'EV'};
function buildMap(){
  const g=document.getElementById('mapGrid');
  if(!g)return;
  g.innerHTML='';
  slots.forEach(s=>{
    const d=document.createElement('div');
    d.className=`ms ${s}`;
    d.textContent=lbl[s];
    g.appendChild(d);
  });
}
buildMap();
// Random flicker
setInterval(()=>{
  const all=['f','o','f','f','r','d'];
  const i=Math.floor(Math.random()*slots.length);
  slots[i]=all[Math.floor(Math.random()*all.length)];
  buildMap();
  // update occ
  const o=slots.filter(s=>s==='o').length;
  const pct=Math.round(o/slots.length*100);
  const el=document.getElementById('occ-val');
  if(el)el.textContent=pct+'%';
  const r=document.getElementById('rev-val');
  if(r){const rv=Math.floor(800+Math.random()*200);r.textContent='€'+rv;}
},2200);

// ===== SCROLL REVEAL =====
const rvEls=document.querySelectorAll('.rv');
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.1});
rvEls.forEach(e=>obs.observe(e));

// ===== COUNTER ANIMATION =====
function animNum(el){
  const t=parseInt(el.dataset.count);
  let n=0;const step=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(t/55));
  const iv=setInterval(()=>{n=Math.min(n+step,t);el.textContent=n+(t>=100?'+':'');if(n>=t)clearInterval(iv);},22);
}
const cObs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{
  es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.querySelectorAll('[data-count]').forEach(animNum);cObs.unobserve(e.target);}});
},{threshold:.3});
document.querySelectorAll('.hero-trust,.prob-stats,#statsbar,.metrics-col,.data-grid').forEach(s=>cObs.observe(s));

// ===== BAR CHART =====
const barData7={labels:['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'],vals:[3200,4100,3800,4600,5100,4300,3700]};
const barData30={labels:['W1','W2','W3','W4'],vals:[22000,28000,25000,31000]};
const barData90={labels:['Jan','Feb','Mar'],vals:[85000,92000,110000]};
let cd=barData7;
function renderBars(){
  const ch=document.getElementById('barChart');
  if(!ch)return;
  const mx=Math.max(...cd.vals);
  ch.innerHTML='';
  cd.labels.forEach((l,i)=>{
    const pct=Math.round((cd.vals[i]/mx)*120);
    const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='bar-item';
    d.innerHTML=`<div class="bar-fill" style="height:${pct}px;"></div><span class="bar-lbl">${l}</span>`;
    ch.appendChild(d);
  });
}
function setPeriod(btn,key){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cp').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  cd=key==='7d'?barData7:key==='30d'?barData30:barData90;
  renderBars();
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',renderBars);
setTimeout(renderBars,200);

// ===== BILLING TOGGLE =====
let isY=true;
function togBill(){
  isY=!isY;
  const t=document.getElementById('bt');
  t.classList.toggle('on',isY);
  document.querySelectorAll('.pv').forEach(e=>{
    e.textContent='€'+(isY?e.dataset.y:e.dataset.m);
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.plan sub').forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.textContent.includes('contact')) e.textContent=isY?' /mo · billed annually':' /mo · billed monthly';
  });
}

// ===== NAVBAR ACTIVE =====
const secs=document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
const nls=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-ul a');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  let cur='';
  secs.forEach(s=>{if(pageYOffset>=s.offsetTop-130)cur=s.id;});
  nls.forEach(a=>{a.classList.toggle('on',a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+cur);});
});

// ===== FORM SUBMIT =====
function fSubmit(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const b=document.getElementById('fBtn');
  b.textContent='✓ Sent!';b.style.background='#059669';b.disabled=true;
  setTimeout(()=>{b.textContent='Send Request →';b.style.background='';b.disabled=false;e.target.reset();},3500);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
