content.text:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation. Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: The conversation covers a series of progressive website building tasks: **Request 1**: Analyze wisdomep.com/en (smart parking IoT company) and create an HTML skeleton with sections: Chi Siamo, Prodotti, Business Plan, Ricerca Clienti — styled similarly to the reference site. **Request 2**: Using the Trivium logo (triangle with 3 converging lines and glowing cyan dot), create a second, more interactive site with white/azure colors, very tech/animated, with schemas and diagrams. **Request 3**: Create a third site again with white/azure colors referencing wisdomep.com, much more technological and animated, with tech schemas and explanations. The user also uploaded 4 images and 6 videos (MP4) of IoT/smart-parking hardware to potentially embed. **Request 4**: "In the initial presentation screen (the hero) of the last site (pioteye.html), add the trivium.html that was built before" — interpreted as replacing the hero-visual widget with the animated Trivium logo (with glow rings, orbiting dots, floating animation). **Request 5 (CURRENT / MOST RECENT)**: "Instead, let's do this first — to trivium.html add the sections from after the initial dashboard/presentation of the last site (pioteye.html), keeping the layout and graphics, but changing the presentation sections with those of the last site." In other words: trivium.html's hero stays as-is, but ALL the body sections from pioteye.html (problem, schema, video products, how-it-works, data analytics, stats, plans, contact) should be merged in, adapted to trivium's dark theme. --- 2. Key Technical Concepts: - Pure HTML/CSS/JS single-file websites (no frameworks) - CSS custom properties (variables) for theming - Inline SVG logos with gradient definitions and glow filters - Canvas particle network animation (JS) - CSS keyframe animations: floating, pulsing rings, orbiting dots, fade-up, typed text - Scroll-triggered reveal (IntersectionObserver) - Counter animations on scroll - Animated SVG architecture diagrams with stroke-dasharray flow-line animations - Video backgrounds (muted, autoplay, loop) with CSS overlay for text coverage - Interactive product tabs with panel switching (JS) - Billing toggle (monthly/annual price switching in JS) - FAQ accordion (JS expand/collapse) - Bar chart rendering in JS (dynamic DOM manipulation) - SVG donut chart - Form submit with visual feedback - Navbar active section tracking (scroll event) - Responsive design with CSS Grid and media queries - Two distinct color themes: Dark navy+cyan (trivium) vs White+azure (pioteye) --- 3. Files and Code Sections: **`/sessions/dazzling-blissful-curie/mnt/outputs/wisdomep-skeleton.html`** - First skeleton site replicating wisdomep.com style (blue/dark theme) - Sections: Topbar, Navbar, Hero with parking dashboard card, Chi Siamo, Partners, 6 Product cards, Stats, Business Plan (3 tiers), Ricerca Clienti, Footer - CSS: `--blue-dark:#0a1628`, `--cyan:#00c8e0` **`/sessions/dazzling-blissful-curie/mnt/outputs/trivium.html`** - Dark navy + cyan theme, very interactive - CSS Variables: `--bg-deep:#1a1e24; --bg-card:#22272f; --cyan:#00d4e8; --border:rgba(0,212,232,0.15);` - Trivium logo recreated as inline SVG (double triangle + 3 converging lines + glowing center dot) - Hero has animated logo with `glow-ring` (3 rings) + `logo-svg` (floating animation) - Key CSS classes: `.tag`, `.sec-title`, `.sec-sub`, `.divider`, `.btn-cyan`, `.btn-ghost`, `.reveal`, `.container` - Sections: Canvas particles, Topbar, Navbar, Hero (typed text + animated logo), Chi Siamo (about card + values grid + timeline), Partners, Products (tabs: All/IoT/Cloud/AI), Stats, Business Plan (toggle + 3 plans), Ricerca Clienti (4-step process + FAQ accordion + contact form + testimonials + CTA banner), Footer - 1031 lines total **`/sessions/dazzling-blissful-curie/mnt/outputs/pioteye.html`** - White + azure theme, P-IOTEYE branding → updated to Trivium throughout - CSS Variables: `--white:#ffffff; --azure:#0ea5e9; --azure-mid:#0284c7; --navy:#0c1a2e; --border:#e0eeff;` - Key CSS classes: `.wrap`, `.chip`, `.h2`, `.lead`, `.bar`, `.btn-blue`, `.btn-outline`, `.rv` (reveal), `.rv.d1/.d2/.d3/.d4` (delay variants) - Hero right side: originally parking dashboard, then replaced with animated Trivium logo - Trivium logo in hero uses: `.logo-scene`, `.t-ring` (×4), `.orbit-wrap`/`.orbit-dot`, `.trivium-logo-hero` - Sections after hero: - `#problem` (lines 632–669): video background (`The_Science_of_the_Curb` MP4), dark overlay, stats grid (`.pstat`), fact list - `#schema` (lines 671–805): animated SVG IoT architecture diagram (5 nodes, flow-line animations), 4 `.sc-card` feature cards - `#products` (lines 807–924): 6 `.vcard` cards each with embedded MP4 video + overlay + body content - `#how` (lines 926–963): 5-step `.steps-flow` with animated connecting line (background gradient animation) - `#data` (lines 965–1040): dark section with bar chart (JS-rendered), donut SVG chart, `.metric-card` column - `#statsbar` (lines 1042–1050): gradient banner, 4 stat boxes - `#plans` (lines 1052–1112): 3 pricing plans with billing toggle - CTA Band (video background): lines 1114–1130 - `#contact` (lines 1132–1208): contact info + form - Footer: lines 1210–1373 - Video paths: `../uploads/Built_for_the_Storm__version_1.mp4` etc. - 1374 lines total **Hero-visual replacement in pioteye.html (Request 4)**: Old: parking dashboard card with live grid New CSS added: ```css .logo-scene{position:relative;width:420px;height:420px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;} .logo-scene::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(14,165,233,.22) 0%,...); animation:bgPulse 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;} .t-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.18);animation:ringPulse 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;} .t-ring:nth-child(1){width:240px;height:240px;} /* 4 rings */ .trivium-logo-hero{width:220px;height:220px;filter:drop-shadow(...);animation:logoFloat 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;} .orbit-wrap{position:absolute;width:310px;height:310px;animation:orbit 8s linear infinite;} ``` New HTML: ```html
Trivium. Where Paths Converge
``` --- 4. Errors and Fixes: - **WebFetch blocked**: wisdomep.com blocked by egress proxy → used WebSearch instead to gather company info - **Edit tool "File has not been read yet"**: When attempting to edit the footer logo in pioteye.html → read the file at the relevant offset first (lines 1108–1124) then successfully applied the edit - **grep tool invalid `file_path` parameter**: Used `Bash` tool with `grep -n "pattern" filepath` instead - **sed exit code 1 with grep count 0**: This was actually a success — grep returning exit code 1 means 0 matches found (i.e., all P-IOTEYE references had been replaced) - **String not found in Edit**: One replacement of "P-IOTEYE" in the CTA section failed with "String to replace not found" → used Bash grep to find all remaining instances, then used sed for batch replacement - **Removing stale JS after hero refactor**: After removing the parking dashboard DOM elements, the JS `buildMap()` and interval functions referencing `mapGrid`, `occ-val`, `rev-val` were left as dead code → removed them and replaced with a comment --- 5. Problem Solving: - **Logo recreation**: Trivium logo not available as a file → recreated as inline SVG with `linearGradient` (dark teal to cyan), double polygon triangles, 3 `` elements converging, `radialGradient` glow, center circles - **Video overlay for text removal**: Original MP4 files contain embedded text — added `
` with `linear-gradient` overlay on top of each video, covering original text and allowing custom text placement - **Theme adaptation strategy**: pioteye.html uses white bg; when merging sections into trivium.html's dark theme, CSS variables need remapping: `--azure→--cyan`, `--white bg→--bg-card`, `--navy text→--white`, `--border:#e0eeff→rgba(0,212,232,0.15)` - **Class name differences**: pioteye uses `.wrap`/`.chip`/`.rv`/`.h2`/`.lead`/`.bar`/`.btn-blue`; trivium uses `.container`/`.tag`/`.reveal`/`.sec-title`/`.sec-sub`/`.divider`/`.btn-cyan` --- 6. All User Messages: 1. "https://www.wisdomep.com/en analizza sito e replicacalo, chi siamo, prodotti, business plan e ricerca clienti, gammi uno scheltro di sito web uguale" 2. [Trivium logo image uploaded] "preparami un altro sito come esempio, e usa questo logo ... https://www.wisdomep.com/en prendi esempio da questo sito, e fallo piu interattivo" 3. [4 images + 6 MP4 videos uploaded] "bellissimo, ra fanne un altro giocando con i colori bianco e azzurro, prendendo sempre come riferimento https://www.wisdomep.com/en, fallo molto tecnologico e animato, con schemi e spiegazioni, ma molto smart. ti lascio qualche foto o video che puoi decidere di implementare se ti piacciono, ovviamente se ci sono testi o foto nei video rimuovili. buon lavoro" 4. "ottimo nella schermata iniziale (quella di presentazione) voglio che aggiungi a questo sito, in questo ultimo sito voglio aggiungere questa trivium.html che hai costruito prima, Apri il sito aggiornato" 5. "anzi facciamo prima, a questo sito di trivium.html aggiungi la parte successiva alla dashboard iniziale di presentazione del ultimo sito, mantenendo layout e grafiche, ma cambiando le sezioni di presentazione con quelle del ultimo sito. Apri il sito aggiornato" --- 7. Pending Tasks: - **PRIMARY PENDING**: Complete the merge of trivium.html + pioteye.html sections. <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="it">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Trivium — Where Paths Converge</title>
<style>
/* ========== RESET & VARIABLES ========== */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --bg-deep:#1a1e24;
  --bg-card:#22272f;
  --bg-card2:#2a3040;
  --cyan:#00d4e8;
  --cyan2:#00b4c8;
  --cyan-glow:rgba(0,212,232,0.18);
  --cyan-glow2:rgba(0,212,232,0.06);
  --white:#ffffff;
  --gray:#8896a8;
  --gray2:#b0bec5;
  --border:rgba(0,212,232,0.15);
  --font:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;
  --radius:14px;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg-deep);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}
img{display:block;max-width:100%;}

/* ========== CANVAS PARTICLES ========== */
#particles{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}

/* ========== UTILITY ========== */
.container{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(0,212,232,0.1);
  border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--cyan);font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:30px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.tag .dot{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--cyan);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}50%{transform:scale(1.5);opacity:.5;}}
h2.sec-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.6rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:14px;}
h2.sec-title span{color:var(--cyan);}
.sec-sub{font-size:1rem;color:var(--gray2);line-height:1.75;max-width:620px;}
.divider{width:50px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),transparent);border-radius:3px;margin:0 0 28px;}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 30px;border-radius:8px;
  font-weight:700;font-size:.94rem;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .25s;letter-spacing:.02em;}
.btn-cyan{background:var(--cyan);color:#0a1628;}
.btn-cyan:hover{background:#00eeff;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,212,232,0.35);}
.btn-ghost{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,212,232,0.3);color:var(--white);}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);background:rgba(0,212,232,0.1);}

/* ========== TOPBAR ========== */
.topbar{background:rgba(15,18,24,0.95);padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;z-index:100;}
.topbar .container{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.topbar-left{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray);}
.topbar-left a{color:var(--cyan);margin:0 6px;}
.topbar-right{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;font-size:.82rem;}
.topbar-right a{color:var(--gray);}
.topbar-right a.active{color:var(--cyan);font-weight:700;}
.topbar-right a:hover{color:var(--white);}

/* ========== NAVBAR ========== */
.navbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:99;
  background:rgba(22,27,34,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.navbar .container{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:68px;}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;cursor:pointer;}
.nav-logo-text{font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.03em;}
.nav-logo-text span{color:var(--cyan);}
.nav-sub{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--gray);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:30px;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--gray2);font-weight:500;padding:6px 2px;
  border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover,.nav-links a.active{color:var(--cyan);border-bottom-color:var(--cyan);}
.nav-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;}
.hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;}
.hamburger span{display:block;width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--white);border-radius:2px;transition:.3s;}

/* ========== HERO ========== */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:100px 0 80px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
/* glow bg */
.hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-150px;right:-200px;
  width:700px;height:700px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,212,232,0.1) 0%,transparent 65%);
  border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;}
.hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-100px;left:-150px;
  width:500px;height:500px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,180,200,0.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;}
.hero .container{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:70px;align-items:center;}
.hero-left{animation:fadeUp .8s ease both;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.1rem,4.5vw,3.8rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.08;margin-bottom:24px;}
.hero h1 span{color:var(--cyan);position:relative;}
.hero h1 span::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:100%;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),transparent);}
.hero p{color:var(--gray2);font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:36px;max-width:500px;}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:50px;}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:36px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:30px;}
.hstat .n{font-size:2.1rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);line-height:1;}
.hstat .l{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:5px;letter-spacing:.04em;}

/* Hero visual — Trivium Logo animated */
.hero-visual{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:fadeUp .8s .2s ease both;}
.logo-wrapper{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:380px;height:380px;}
/* Glow rings */
.glow-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,212,232,0.15);animation:ringPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
.glow-ring:nth-child(1){width:280px;height:280px;animation-delay:0s;}
.glow-ring:nth-child(2){width:340px;height:340px;animation-delay:.5s;}
.glow-ring:nth-child(3){width:380px;height:380px;animation-delay:1s;}
@keyframes ringPulse{0%,100%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:.1;transform:scale(1.03);}}
.logo-svg{width:240px;height:240px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(0,212,232,0.5));
  animation:logoFloat 4s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes logoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}

/* ========== CHI SIAMO ========== */
#chi-siamo{padding:110px 0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
#chi-siamo .container{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;}
.about-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  padding:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.about-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-80px;right:-80px;width:250px;height:250px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,212,232,0.08) 0%,transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;}
.about-card h3{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:16px;color:var(--cyan);}
.about-card p{color:var(--gray2);line-height:1.8;font-size:.93rem;margin-bottom:20px;}
.ab-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-top:28px;}
.ab-stat{background:var(--bg-card2);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;border:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;}
.ab-stat .n{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);}
.ab-stat .l{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:3px;}
.values-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:26px;}
.val-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;}
.val-card:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.val-card .icon{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:10px;}
.val-card h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;}
.val-card p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;}
/* Timeline */
.timeline{margin-top:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.tl-item{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;}
.tl-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px;
  box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--cyan);}
.tl-item h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);}
.tl-item p{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:3px;}

/* ========== PRODOTTI ========== */
#prodotti{padding:110px 0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.products-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:36px 0 40px;}
.ptab{padding:10px 22px;border-radius:30px;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--gray);background:transparent;transition:all .2s;}
.ptab:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--cyan);}
.ptab.active{background:var(--cyan);color:#0a1628;border-color:var(--cyan);}
.products-panel{display:none;}
.products-panel.active{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;
  animation:fadeIn .4s ease;}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.prod-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
  overflow:hidden;transition:all .25s;cursor:pointer;}
.prod-card:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,212,232,0.12);}
.prod-card-top{padding:32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.prod-card-top::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:-60px;right:-60px;width:180px;height:180px;
  border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,212,232,0.1) 0%,transparent 70%);}
.prod-icon{font-size:2.4rem;}
.prod-card-top h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;}
.prod-card-bottom{padding:0 32px 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.prod-card-bottom p{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.65;}
.prod-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:4px;}
.prod-tag{background:rgba(0,212,232,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,232,0.2);
  color:var(--cyan);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;}
.prod-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:var(--cyan);
  font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:6px;transition:gap .2s;}
.prod-card:hover .prod-link{gap:10px;}

/* ========== STATS ========== */
#stats{padding:70px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,60,70,.4),rgba(0,30,50,.4));
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;z-index:1;}
#stats .container{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;}
.stat-box{text-align:center;padding:28px 16px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;}
.stat-box:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.stat-box .sn{font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);line-height:1;}
.stat-box .sl{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray);margin-top:8px;}

/* ========== BUSINESS PLAN ========== */
#business-plan{padding:110px 0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
#business-plan .container{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.5fr;gap:70px;align-items:start;}
.bp-left{position:sticky;top:90px;}
.bp-feature{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:22px;}
.bp-icon-box{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card2);
  border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .2s,border-color .2s;}
.bp-feature:hover .bp-icon-box{background:rgba(0,212,232,0.1);border-color:var(--cyan);}
.bp-feature h4{font-size:.93rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;}
.bp-feature p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.65;}
/* Pricing toggle */
.toggle-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:30px;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--gray);}
.toggle{width:52px;height:28px;background:var(--bg-card2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:30px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:background .3s;}
